description: Checks that strategic 5K progression advice stays at the requested planning level instead of pivoting into today's saved weekly plan.
user_message: Okay, so what's a realistic 5k progression? I want to get faster in the 5k.

initial_context.weekly_plan:
Monday: 5 easy
Tuesday: 4 easy
Wednesday: workout
Thursday: rest or cross-training
Friday: 5 easy
Saturday: 12 long
Sunday: 4 recovery
initial_context.training_summary: Reviewed 5 runs over the last 7 days. Recent training is steady with one controlled threshold workout.
initial_context.recent_runs:
Recent runs:
- Sunday race: full activity 3.15 mi in 20:02, with Strava 5K best effort of 19:59, avg HR 168.
- Wednesday threshold workout: 5 x 5 min around 6:50/mi with controlled recoveries.
- Tuesday easy: 4.00 mi at 8:42/mi.
initial_context.training_goal: Primary goal: NYC Marathon on November 1, 2026 under 3:10. Secondary goal: beat 19:59 in the 5K on September 26.
initial_context.pace_calibration:

Best anchor is the Strava 5K best effort of 19:59 from a full 3.15 mi activity in 20:02, VDOT 49.9, so use VDOT 50 conservatively. Easy 8:16-9:06/mi, Marathon 7:18/mi, Threshold 6:52/mi.
